# Firebase Firestore DB Schema

## Collections

### `articles` (Collection)

This collection stores all the articles written and published by journalists.

**Document ID:** Auto-generated by Firestore (or standard UUID string).

**Fields:**
- `id` (String): The unique identifier of the article.
- `title` (String): The title of the article.
- `subtitle` (String): A brief summary or subtitle.
- `content` (String): The main body text of the article.
- `author` (String): The name of the journalist who wrote the article.
- `thumbnailUrl` (String): A URL reference to the image in Firebase Cloud Storage.
- `thumbnailStoragePath` (String): The exact path in Firebase Cloud Storage (e.g. `media/articles/{articleId}/thumbnail.jpg`).
- `publishedAt` (Timestamp): A Firestore server timestamp representing the publication date.

## Cloud Storage Structure
- `media/articles/{articleId}/{filename}`: Each article stores its thumbnail inside a subfolder identified by the article's Firestore document ID, ensuring uniqueness.
